channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oil resurfaces as a key factor in global geopolitics amid Middle East tensions
item.description: In 2026, oil has once again demonstrated its enduring influence on global politics and the economy. Despite a smaller share of global energy coming from oil compared to the 1970s, consumption has near...

item.title: Zanzibar records progress in trade and industrial development during Mwinyi’s first 100 days
item.description: Zanzibar Ministry of Trade and Industrial Development has shown major progress in the first 100 days of executing the 2025–2030 CCM Election Manifesto. Acting Minister Shariff Ali Shariff reported tha...

item.title: Federal Ministry of Education Assessment Team Visits Bonny Polytechnic for Development Review
item.description: On Wednesday, one high-powered team from the Federal Ministry of Education, Abuja, waka come visit Federal Polytechnic of Oil and Gas, Bonny for one needs assessment exercise for 2026. The team, wey d...

item.title: Government Consults Opposition on Early Implementation of Women’s Reservation Act
item.description: The Government of India has begun informal consultations with Opposition leaders regarding the implementation of the Constitution (One Hundred and Sixth Amendment) Act, also known as the Women’s Reser...

item.title: Pakistan announces austerity measures including four-day work week to manage oil crisis
item.description: Due to the ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran and the resulting surge in global oil prices, Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has introduced major austerity measures to protect the economy. K...

item.title: British public overwhelmingly opposes involvement in US-led war on Iran
item.description: Owen Jones argues that British political and media elites are repeating the mistakes of past foreign interventions, particularly those led by the United States, such as Iraq, Afghanistan, Libya, and G...

item.title: Raiders Revamp Roster with Linderbaum and Key Free Agent Signings
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders have launched an aggressive roster overhaul during the 2026 NFL legal tampering period, spending big to strengthen both offense and defense. The centerpiece of the spending is ce...

item.title: City begins phased cleanup of E.C. Row Expressway in Windsor
item.description: Windsor city crews have commenced a rolling cleanup of the E.C. Row Expressway, aiming to improve safety and traffic flow along this key route. The operation involves systematic debris removal, cleari...

item.title: Defending Nigeria's Democracy Against Internal Critics and Underminers
item.description: This article argue say democracy na ongoing process wey dey base on popular sovereignty, no be something wey static or one-time event. Even America wey people dey call beacon of democracy still get hi...

item.title: Live Nation and Ticketmaster Reach DOJ Settlement Requiring Platform Changes and Venue Divestments
item.description: Live Nation has reached a settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) that prevents the breakup of its Ticketmaster division, a move that had been considered during a lengthy antitrust trial....

item.title: Lavender Hill community worker seeks police help after repeated burglaries
item.description: Charmaine Josephs, affectionately known as the 'Mother Teresa' of Lavender Hill, has spent over two decades transforming her life and helping her community. Once imprisoned for drug-related offences, ...

item.title: U.S. Senators Call for Probe into Strike on Iranian Girls' School
item.description: U.S. senators are pressing the Pentagon for details on a deadly airstrike that hit a girls' elementary school in Minab, southern Iran, during the opening days of U.S.-Israeli military operations again...

item.title: BoT assures public on secure and reliable payment systems
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) has assured citizens that the country’s payment systems are secure and resilient against cyber threats, showing growing confidence in Tanzania’s digital financial infrastruc...

item.title: Businessman Claims R8.4 Million Lost Following Medicare24 Tender Dispute
item.description: North West businessman Suliman Carrim told the Madlanga commission that he lost R8.4 million after funding Vusimuzi “Cat” Matlala’s healthcare company, Medicare24, which was contracted to provide medi...

item.title: Trump indicates possible near-term end of Israel-Iran conflict, but U.S. retains key targets
item.description: On March 10, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump made statements regarding the ongoing Israel-Iran conflict, indicating that the war may end 'very soon'. Speaking at his Doral National golf club near Mi...

item.title: President Marcos to Wait for Congressional Committee Report Before Certifying Emergency Powers Bill for Oil Excise Tax Reduction as Urgent
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. is set to wait for the committee report in Congress on proposed bills that would grant him emergency powers to reduce excise taxes on oil products before he c...

item.title: Trump Highlights Legislative Priorities for Republicans Ahead of Midterm Elections
item.description: Former President Donald Trump presented five legislative priorities he believes are critical for Republicans to maintain control of Congress in the upcoming midterm elections. Speaking at the Republic...

item.title: Australia Sends Surveillance Aircraft and Troops to Support UAE Amid Escalating Middle East Conflict
item.description: Australia has committed to deploying a surveillance aircraft, advanced medium-range air-to-air missiles, and 85 troops to the United Arab Emirates following a request from Abu Dhabi. The move is aimed...

item.title: Kenya Sets National Government Spending Ceiling at Sh2.878 Trillion for 2026/27
item.description: The National Assembly Budget and Appropriations Committee has recommended a total national government spending ceiling of Sh2.878 trillion for the 2026/27 financial year. The bulk of this, Sh2.797 tri...

item.title: NGO Provides Energy-Efficient Cookstoves to Women in Kaduna Communities
item.description: One NGO wey dem dey call Bridge That Gap Hope for Africa Initiative (BTG) don distribute energy-efficient cookstoves to women wey dey for climate-affected areas of Kaduna. This project na part of the ...
